name: ultrasec
description: Audit a whole repo for security vulnerabilities by tracing untrusted data across functions and files (cross-file source→sink taint), orchestrating best-in-class OSS scanners (Trivy, OpenGrep/Semgrep, gitleaks, osv-scanner, bandit, gosec, checkov, hadolint…), correlating their findings across tools and ranking by EPSS/CISA-KEV/CVSS risk, then adversarially verifying every finding into a cited, tiered report. A deterministic zero-dependency engine builds the link-graph and evidence packets; the AI does the security reasoning. A skills.sh agent skill.

scripts.check:build: tsup && node scripts/copy-bundle.mjs && git diff --exit-code -- scripts/ultrasec.mjs skills/ultrasec/scripts/ultrasec.mjs && node scripts/verify-skill-bundle.mjs
scripts.demo: node scripts/ultrasec.mjs scan --repo tests/fixtures/vuln-express --out /tmp/ultrasec-demo && node scripts/ultrasec.mjs check --run /tmp/ultrasec-demo

author: maxgfr
